{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Aetheric telekinesis
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Natural resistance weakens [[Aetheric telekinesis]] as a person tries to reassert control over their local [[Aether]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c51">''The Engineer'', chapter 51</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
